notes:
v1.8.0 Update
- Added shop-level complimentary gifts with spend thresholds and one-time or repeatable claims.
- Added a compact player gift panel with progress, remaining spend, and claim status.
- Gift claims are GM-authoritative, and granted copies have no resale value in Stylish Shop.
- Lifetime-spend progress now rolls back with failed purchases and preserves the configured currency denomination.
- External storefronts can read gift progress and request claims through the public API.

v1.7.0 Feature Update
- Stylish Relationship Tracker ranks can control discounts, greetings, NPC artwork, item unlocks, and progress earned from purchases.
- Added shop-wide limited-time sales, Roll Table Stock Pools, and purchase-count stamp rewards.
- Added built-in and custom marketplace categories, per-theme font controls, a larger Shop Settings interface, and external storefront APIs.
- Fixed buyer detection for Lancer and other systems, NPC portrait fallbacks, and the Theme settings footer.
- Requires GlitchSmith Library v0.10.0 or newer.

announcement.title: 🛍️ Stylish Shop v1.8.0
announcement.content:
Stylish Shop v1.8.0 adds shop-level complimentary gift programs.

  • GMs can assign Item rewards with a spend milestone and choose one-time or repeatable claims.
  • Players can track and claim rewards from a compact panel inside the shop.
  • Claims are validated by the active GM, and granted copies cannot be sold back through Stylish Shop.
  • Spend progress now participates in purchase rollback and keeps the currency denomination selected by the GM.
  • External storefronts can read gift progress and request claims through the public API.

Recent v1.7.0 features are also included:

  • Stylish Relationship Tracker ranks can control discounts, greetings, NPC artwork, item unlocks, and progress earned from purchases.
  • Shop-wide limited-time sales, Roll Table Stock Pools, and purchase-count stamp rewards add new pricing and stock options.
  • Built-in and custom marketplace categories, per-theme font controls, a larger Shop Settings interface, and external storefront APIs support larger catalogs.
  • Buyer detection now supports Lancer and other systems that do not use a standard character Actor type.
  • GlitchSmith Library v0.10.0 or newer is required.
